case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. vs. SMILOW, FRED et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMILOW, FRED FREDRICKS, ALEX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2130 STOCKTON ST #212, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE [CRC 522]

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMILOW, FRED FREDRICKS, ALEX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 08/02.95 $4,545.98 RENT, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,490.98, LEASE FORFEITED
